zh.lifeSummary: Reginald de Longeville是Henry I de Longeville和Mrs Henry de Longeville的兒子，於1140年出生在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾奧爾頓 隆維爾。他和Beatrice至少有3個兒子。他去世於1202年享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Longeville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Longueville-la-Gifart, now Longueville-sur-Scie (Seine-Maritime, France).

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

en.lifeSummary: Reginald de Longeville was born in 1140, in Orton Longueville, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Henry I de Longeville and Mrs Henry de Longeville. He had at least 3 sons with Beatrice. He died in 1202, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Reginald de Longeville est né en 1140, à Orton Longueville, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Henry I de Longeville et Mrs Henry de Longeville. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Beatrice. Il est décédé en 1202, à l’âge de 62 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Reginald de Longevilleは1140年にイギリスイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアオルトン ロングエヴィルでHenry I de LongevilleとMrs Henry de Longevilleの息子として生まれた。彼はBeatriceとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1202年に62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Reginald de Longeville(은)는 1140년 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르 오턴 론구에빌에서 Henry I de Longeville(와)과 Mrs Henry de Longeville의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Beatrice(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1202년 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Reginald de Longeville родился в 1140 г. в местности ортон лонгуевилл, хантингдоншир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Henry I de Longeville и Mrs Henry de Longeville. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Beatrice. Он умер в 1202 г. в возрасте 62 лет.
